heading: Financial transactions between labor organization and officers and employees
label: 503 Financial transactions between labor organization and officers and employees

children.heading: Direct and indirect loans
children.label: a Direct and indirect loans
children.text: No labor organization shall make directly or indirectly any loan or loans to any officer or employee of such organization which results in a total indebtedness on the part of such officer or employee to the labor organization in excess of $2,000.

children.heading: Direct or indirect payment of fines
children.label: b Direct or indirect payment of fines
children.text: No labor organization or employer shall directly or indirectly pay the fine of any officer or employee convicted of any willful violation of this chapter.

children.heading: Penalty for violations
children.label: c Penalty for violations
children.text: Any person who willfully violates this section shall be fined not more than $5,000 or imprisoned for not more than one year, or both.
